summary: Full backend and frontend testing of Partner Billing System (Partner Subscriptions, Partner Orders, Partner Orgs plan filter). 28/28 backend tests passed. All frontend flows tested end-to-end. Found and fixed 1 bug: audit log sort field in partner_billing.py.

ui_bugs.issue: Dev environment hydration warning: '<tr> cannot be a child of <tbody> with a <span> wrapper' — same dev-platform artifact as PlansTab/TenantLicenseModal in iter146/iter147. Not a functional issue, renders and works correctly.

bugs_fixed_this_iteration.bug: get_partner_order and get_partner_subscription endpoints sorted audit logs by 'timestamp' field, but audit_service.py stores 'created_at'. Sort was a no-op (same pattern as plans.py bug fixed in iter147).
bugs_fixed_this_iteration.fix: Changed both sort calls from .sort('timestamp', -1) to .sort('created_at', -1) for correct reverse-chronological order.

critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: partner_billing.py get_partner_order and get_partner_subscription both sorted audit_logs by 'timestamp' (non-existent field). Fixed to 'created_at' to match audit_service.py schema.
NOTE: PartnerOrdersTab.tsx delete order button has no data-testid on the Trash2 delete button or AlertDialogAction. Minor testing concern only.
NOTE: PartnerSubscriptionsTab stats use .mrr/.arr which only show when subscriptions are active - works correctly (MRR shows £99.00 when active subscription exists).
NOTE: TenantsTab plan filter only shows when plans.length > 0 (plans API must return at least one plan). Currently correct — shows 'All Plans, Pro Plus, Pro, Starter'.
seed_data_creation: Created 2 test partner subscriptions (PS-2026-0001, PS-2026-0002) and 2 test partner orders (PO-2026-0001, PO-2026-0002) during backend/frontend tests. Both subscriptions cancelled. Orders: PO-0001 set to paid, PO-0002 unpaid.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Partner Billing System fully tested and working. Backend: 28/28 tests at /app/backend/tests/test_iter148_partner_billing.py. Frontend: PLATFORM sidebar shows Partner Orgs/Plans/Partner Subscriptions/Partner Orders tabs for platform_admin. Partner Subscriptions: stats cards (Total, Active, New This Month, Cancelled), MRR/ARR blocks, filters (partner/status/plan/interval), New Subscription button → modal with all fields. Partner Orders: stats cards (Total, This Month, Paid, Unpaid/Pending), Revenue (paid) block, filters (partner/status/plan), New Order button → modal with all fields. Partner Orgs: plan filter dropdown shows active plans + 'All Plans'. Bug fixed: audit log sort 'timestamp' → 'created_at' in partner_billing.py (same pattern as iter147 plans.py fix). Dev-env hydration warning for <tr> in <span> is a dev-platform artifact across multiple tabs, not a functional issue.

audit_log_sort_bug.root_cause: partner_billing.py get_partner_order and get_partner_subscription endpoints called .sort('timestamp', -1) on audit_logs collection, but audit_service.py stores field as 'created_at' not 'timestamp'. MongoDB ignores sorts on non-existent fields, returning logs in natural insertion order.
audit_log_sort_bug.fix_applied: Changed both sort calls to .sort('created_at', -1) for correct reverse-chronological ordering. Same root cause and fix as plans.py in iter147.
audit_log_sort_bug.impact: Low - logs were returned in insertion order instead of reverse-chronological, affecting only the audit log detail view for individual orders/subscriptions.
